removeInvoiceDetail: All invoices and their items for this shop will be deleted.
removeReservationsDetail: All reservation data for this shop will be deleted.
removeGalleryDetail: Gallery images for this shop will be deleted.
removeCustomersDetail: Registered customer records for this shop will be deleted.
removeReportsDetail: Report-related settings/data will be deleted (if any).
removePosDetail: POS-related data for this shop may be deleted/hidden (depending on settings).
removeSalesDetail: Sales will be disabled, and sales/customer/report related data may be deleted (depending on settings).
removeDefaultDetail: Data associated with this button will be deleted.
customersRequiresSales: Customers or Reports cannot be enabled before enabling Orders / Sales.
noNewModulesSelected: No new additional buttons were selected to send to admin
requestSentDesc: Your request is being processed by admin. Buttons will appear after approval.
upgradeDesc: Core buttons are always present. Enable the extras you need.
